task_description: Address critical and high-priority build and runtime issues discovered in the deep audit to ensure a reliable release pipeline and stable updates.

deliverables.description: Add ISO size validation (must be < 2 GiB) to the `.github/workflows/build-iso.yml` CI pipeline.
Create a new verification script `tests/verify_iso_size.sh` to validate that size optimization settings (compression, NoExtract) are present in the build configuration.
Add explicit dependency validation checks for `snapper` and `btrfs` to the beginning of the `airootfs/usr/local/bin/neos-autoupdate.sh` script to prevent silent failures during updates.

constraints: Do not refactor unrelated logic in the target scripts.
Do not implement new features outside the stated deliverables.
Ensure the `verify_iso_size.sh` script exits cleanly and follows project testing conventions.
